top_10.rationale: Springer book chapter 'Attention Mechanism and Transformers' — directly on topic, published in a Springer volume. Introduces attention as a data-weighting strategy and its role in deep learning models and sequence modeling.
Book page for 'Attention Mechanisms in Deep Learning: Master Transformers' — explicitly a book bridging attention theory and production-grade implementation of transformers.

'Dive into Deep Learning' (D2L.ai) — authoritative open interactive textbook, Chapter 11 'Attention Mechanisms and Transformers'. Book-format online textbook covering the complete transformer attention mechanism.

Comprehensive tutorial and survey 'Attention Mechanism, Transformers, BERT, and GPT' — covers attention mechanism, seq2seq, self-attention, encoder-decoder architecture. Survey depth matches a book chapter.
PDF of the tutorial and survey 'Attention Mechanism, Transformers, BERT, and GPT' — same comprehensive coverage in PDF form, suitable for book-mode reading.

'Attention Is All You Need' (arXiv 1706.03762) — the foundational transformer paper, cited in every book on the topic. Essential reference for any book-level treatment of transformer attention mechanisms.
NeurIPS published PDF of 'Attention Is All You Need' — official proceedings version of the foundational transformer paper, authoritative primary source.
Comprehensive review 'Transformer Architecture and Attention Mechanisms in Genome Data Analysis' — covers transformer architecture and attention mechanisms thoroughly, book-chapter depth.
'Transformer models: an introduction and catalog' — comprehensive catalog of transformer architectures and attention mechanism variants; survey breadth comparable to a book chapter.
Wikipedia article on 'Attention Is All You Need' — encyclopedic reference covering the history, architecture, and impact of the transformer attention mechanism paper.
